entry.title: World Skill First Competition Module_A, my process
entry.content:
I want to recode my studying process. This is the world skill practice project.

including

Mysql

DataBase Design

HashPassword

User Login

I will follow GPT and step by step build the project.

First–DataBase Design

Create Next app

Download prism

Then, create/open.env file and add a line

generally: DATABASE_URL="mysql://DB_USER:DB_PASSWORD@127.0.0.1:3306/DB_NAME"

Me: DATABASE_URL="mariadb://root@127.0.0.1:3307/flexiwork"

Open the file /prisma/schema.prisma

Change the original file into

And build a file /lib/prisma.js, avoid prisma overhit

Afterwards, start design database.

I created eight table:

User

Room

Option

RoomOption

Booking

BookingOption

CreditTransaction

And this is my logical

管理员先定义房间 Room

再给房间配置当前可选服务 RoomOption

用户搜索房间后创建 Booking

若勾选了服务，就写入多条 BookingOption

确认后写入一条 CreditTransaction 扣积分

管理员加值时再写另一条 CreditTransaction

Then, run npx prisma validate to check the connection

Run npx prisma migrate dev --name init and npx prisma generate, so that can put those table into DataBase

Second–Plant Data Seed

Before seed, I build a file /lib/password.js

Build /prisma/seed.cjs

We had better using .cjs file because seed file is run by node.

Require some important module

After that, run code node prisma/seed.cjs and it will put those data to database.

Third–Login

Create User and Admin page /app/admin/page.js /app/user/page.js

Then build a simple login logic in /app/page.js, after user login, redirect to admin/user page.

But browser doesn’t know who you are. We need a session.

Create /lib/auth.js

since we use process.env.JWT_SECRET, we need to add a line JWT_SECRET in .env

JWT_SECRET="A_ENOUGH_LONG_RANDOM_STRING"

Then, after user login, we should verify password and create token stored in cookies.

In /app/page.js

After that, we create a verify function in /app/admin/layout.js and /app/user/layout to verify whether the role is true

Below is the sample project requirement.

Module A - Test Project

Web Technologies - Backend Development

  • Original Submitted by: Gilles GRANGER - FR
  • Updated by: Daniel Cheang - MO
  • Document: WSC2026_TP_MO

Introduction to Test Project

The FlexiWork company aims to provide a SaaS (Software as a Service) dedicated for coworking space managers. The main objective of this software is to manage allocation and booking of resources, such as desks and meeting rooms. In the long term, it should be highly flexible to adjust to a large variety of use cases.

However, to help them have a successful development with a product that really addresses the customer’s needs, the company partnered with a local coworking space to develop a pilot version, with a narrowed set of features. This minimal version should be usable on its own and allow the development team to collect continuous feedback and make quick iterations.

In this module, you will develop this v1. This version will be used by two types of users:

Coworking Space Administrator

The administrator will be able to:

  • Manage rooms: Create, update and access a list of meeting rooms
  • Manage users: View user’s profiles and give them credits they can use for different services
  • Get an overview of all rooms, with their associated bookings

Coworking Space User

A user will be able to:

  • List upcoming room bookings
  • Manage meeting room bookings: This includes searching for an available room and placing a booking. In this first version, the booking system will be simplified
  • Get a list of his previous transactions

Instructions to the Competitor

  1. No database schema is provided, you are responsible for creating it. Its quality will be assessed; this means you should avoid redundant data, use suitable indexes especially for foreign keys, use consistent namings for columns and table names, etc.

  2. You must include a file named database-dump.sql in your folder.

  3. Some fixtures are provided in Appendix 1. You must import them in your schema, ensuring data integrity. Be careful about typos!

  4. Security: You should also ensure that major security risks are addressed. This means the forms are secured, the sensitive data is properly hashed, and a user can only access the resources he’s supposed to access.

  5. Layout: The layout should be intuitive. No extra design effort is required, but all the pages and features should follow the common UX “laws”, so the user journey is simple to understand.

  6. Code Quality: You should keep in mind that the code will evolve frequently during the pilot phase, so you must apply code quality standards, so other developers can work on it.

  7. Testing: The app will be tested on Desktop mode only, on Google Chrome.

Description of Project and Tasks

Coworking Space Administrator

Login

An admin should be able to login with the following credentials:

  • Username: admin
  • Password: Very$ecret2026!
  • First Name: Super
  • Last Name: Admin

Upon login, an admin should view a navbar, with 3 links: “Home”, “Users” and “Rooms”. No registration is required, every account will be created in advance.

Home Page

The home page presents a schedule where the admin can see all the room bookings for a given day (by default, the current day). The active day is displayed on top of the schedule.

  • Each room is represented by one column, and rows represent hours
  • Each meeting room booking is displayed as a block, from the beginning time to the ending time
  • It is possible to see the previous or the next day by clicking on buttons on top of the schedule view
  • Each booking must display the user’s first and last names, and its beginning and ending times
  • Bookings don’t need to be clickable

Manage Rooms Page

An admin can access a list of the rooms in the coworking space.

  • In the list, each room should be displayed as a card, with its picture, name and capacity
  • All the cards should be clickable and bring the administrator on a page where he’ll be able to edit the room’s details
  • There’s also a “create room” button which shows a similar form, to create a new meeting room
  • No “delete room” action is required currently

When creating or updating a room, the following information should be filled (everything is mandatory, except for the picture when updating):

  • Name (unique)
  • Picture
  • Capacity (number between 2 and 100)
  • A “price” in credits, per hour of use

Optional services: There’s also a possibility to enable optional services the users can book at the same time (video projector, coffee machine, printer…). If enabled, the admin can set a price in credits that will be added to the booking price. The price can be 0, so the option is free for the user.

Important Notes:

  • If you update the price for the room or the options, or even remove an option that were available before, the bookings that have already been placed should not change and the users should see the exact amount they paid at the time they placed their booking, with all the options, even if their price or availability changed
  • The available options that can be linked to a room may evolve frequently in future versions. You can either store them in a clean way in your code, or in a separate table in the database, but you should avoid hardcoding it

Manage Users and View Transactions

The admin can list the users.

  • The list should be ordered by ascending last name and ascending first name if needed
  • No pagination is required
  • No admin user should be presented in this list
  • Each user is clickable, and its profile is displayed

The profile shows:

  • First name and last name of the user
  • A form to add or deduct credits to the user
  • The user’s credits balance, which is the sum of all the transactions listed below
  • A list of all transactions for the user:
    • All bookings, including the credits spent for the booking itself, and also showing the credits spent for each used option
    • All credits added by the admin

Transaction Ordering: All the transactions should be ordered by “created at” date. If a room booking is done on May 1st for June 30th, the transaction should appear on May 1st.

Coworking Space User

Login

Users should be able to login with one the following credentials:

User 1:

  • Username: user1
  • Password: $ecret2026!
  • First Name: John
  • Last Name: Doe

User 2:

  • Username: user2
  • Password: u$er2026!
  • First Name: Jane
  • Last Name: Doe

Upon login, a user should view a navbar, with 3 links: “Home”, “Search” and “Profile”. No registration is required, every account will be created in advance.

Homepage

On the homepage, a user should see the list of his upcoming bookings (for simplicity, you can consider that all the bookings for the current day are also upcoming).

This includes:

  • Room name
  • Total price (room booking and options), in credits
  • Remainder of the selected options
  • Date
  • Start/end time

Ordering: The bookings should be ordered by ascending date (the closest booking from the current date must come first).

Meeting Room Search and Booking

On the “Search” page, the user can view a form where the following information can be entered:

  • Booking date: Only one day. Multi-day bookings will be developed in a further version
  • Booking start and end times: Time slots are multiples of 1 hour. Every room can be booked from 8am to 7pm
  • Attendees: A number greater or equal to 1

Search Results: When submitting the form, all rooms where the capacity is equal or greater to the number of attendees are displayed. All the rooms are displayed as cards.

For each room, display:

  • Photo
  • Name
  • Price (number of hours * price per hour for the room)
  • Available options with their price

Availability Check: For each room, you must calculate if the room will be available between the start and end times. If another booking already exists and overlaps on the required time interval, then the room is unavailable.

Display Order: All available rooms should be shown before the unavailable rooms.

Status Indicators:

  • If the room is unavailable, it should be displayed in black and white, with a “Not available” tag
  • If the room is available for the whole day (no bookings on the whole day), a special “Available all day!” tag must be displayed

Booking Button: On available rooms, a “Book this room” button is displayed if the user has enough credits to book the room, without any options. Otherwise, the button must link to an external URL of your choice, and display “Buy Credits”.

Booking Interface

The user is now able to book the room, without changing the date and times. An interface looking like a shopping cart is displayed.

Main Block:

  • The date, room name, begin and end time are reminded
  • The user can select options in the main block. The options are the ones enabled for the room in the admin backoffice
  • The price for each option is displayed (it is fixed, and does not depend on the booking duration)

Side Block (Pricing): It evolves in real-time if the user checks an option:

  • The room base price is reminded: “X hours * Y credits/hr = Z credits”
  • For each option configured for the room, the user can check it. If checked, the option’s name and price is added to the cart
  • On the bottom of this side block, a “Confirm” button can confirm the booking. However, if after adding options, the user’s credit balance is too low, the button is disabled and displays “x missing credits” instead

Confirmation: Upon confirmation, the user’s credit balance is updated.

Profile Page

The user can see his own profile, in the exact same way as the admin views a user profile (identity, credit balance, transactions).

Difference: Instead of the form for adding credits, the user must see a single informative notice that says: “Coming soon: Top-up your credit balance online on this page!”

Appendix 1 - Data to Import in Database

Users

Already defined in the Test Project: 1 admin and 2 users

Rooms

NameImageMaximum OccupancyPrice in credits per hourOptions
The Web Workshopassets530Video-Projector - 10 credits
The Idea Labassets1050Printer - 20 credits, Coffee Machine - 50 credits
The Braineryassets320Video-Projector - Free, Printer - 30 credits

Bookings

UserBooking created atDate / TimeRoomPrice per hour and totalSelected OptionsTotal spent
user125th May 2024, 18.001st June 2024, 9.00-14.00The Web Workshop20 credits/hr (old pricing) Total: 100 creditsVideo-Projector: 10 credits, Printer: 20 credits (option was available before, but not anymore)130 credits
user11st June 2024, 19.0018th June 2024, 9.00-14.00The Web Workshop30 credits/hr (new pricing since 1st June) Total: 150 creditsVideo-Projector: 10 credits160 credits
user22nd June 2024, 8.0018th June 2024, 9.00-15.00The Brainery20 credits/hr Total: 120 creditsNone120 credits

Users Credit added to balance by Admin

DateUserCredit Amount
20th May 2024 10.00user1+300
20th May 2024 10.00user2+500

User balances on June 3rd should be:

  • user1: 10 credits (300 received, 290 spent)
  • user2: 380 credits (500 received, 120 spent)
entry.summary: I want to recode my studying process. This is the world skill practice project.

entry.title: greedy snake
entry.content:
I make a samll game about greedy snake and I met some problem. I want to moving background so that can simulate the center snake is moving. But there isn’t possible to change the body translate each frame.

Solution:

Not matter what interactive function, both can using World Position to detect.
When we want to show somthing on the screen, just change the World Position into the Screen Position by using formula.

Drawing grid is a good way to simulate background moving.

-camera%gridSize 是判断從一個格子的甚麼位置開始畫

乘負號是因為玩家向右移，背景就要向左移。

When camera is increasing, -camera%gridSize should be decreasing.

This is my project below
entry.summary: I make a samll game about greedy snake and I met some problem. I want to moving background so that can simulate the center snake is movin

entry.title: mysql---the specific user
entry.content:
if you build a project which inculding mysql, and you want to use Aminder to control the database but don’t want to see others irrelevant database, you can read the Aminder official webside, download Adminer.php. Then create a editor.php, and put these two file into a independent folder.

the content of editor.php below

you can delete the function whcih you don’t need.
Afterward, you should login root user and create a user

testAdminer is your user name, quotes is the alternative database

CREATE USER 'testAdminer'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY ''; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON quotes.* TO 'testAdminer'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;

Then, check whether plugin is mysql_native_password.

SELECT user, host, plugin FROM mysql.user WHERE user='testAdminer';

If not, run the code below

ALTER USER 'testAdminer'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY 'testAdminer'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;

plugin 改成 mysql_native_password 可以解决登录问题，是因为：

  • MySQL 支持多种认证插件（如 auth_socket、caching_sha2_password、mysql_native_password）。
  • 默认有些系统（比如 macOS 或 Ubuntu）创建的用户用的是 auth_socket，它只允许系统用户登录，不支持用密码登录。
  • PHP 的 MySQL 扩展（如 mysqli、pdo_mysql）通常只支持 mysql_native_password 或 caching_sha2_password，不支持 auth_socket。

所以，当你把用户的认证插件改成 mysql_native_password 后，PHP 就能用用户名和密码正常连接 MySQL 了。
entry.summary: if you build a project which inculding mysql, and you want to use Aminder to control the database but don’t want to see others irrelevant

entry.title: flex-grow flex-shrink flex-basis
entry.content: If there are redundant space between children flex, they will grow the exact proportion according the value of their flex-grow. However, if their content width occupy the entire container width, their flex-grow would lose effectiveness no matter what proportion is, but their flex-shrink is work. Vice versa.
entry.summary: If there are redundant space between children flex, they will grow the exact proportion according the value of their flex-grow. However,

entry.content:
building python environment are literally troublesome. It take me several hours. And I find that the best approach to build environment is to follow the offical document.
I downloaded pytorch and the bash code below.

reference:

pytorch download

Maybe there are many clashing between these package. Different python version exist different libiom5md.dll

a temporary way is adding code in running py
entry.summary: building python environment are literally troublesome. It take me several hours. And I find that the best approach to build environment i

entry.title: some problem during setting MC server
entry.content:
I want to set a Minecraft server. But it always run into error.

First

Is the environmental problem. Every different mc version demand different JDK. The .bat file contain java need to change the address of corresponding java version.

Second

That start file is .bat, not .jar. Before I aware it, it spend me several hours. (If not exist .bat, you can creat a one and write down

)

Third

Click the .bat file and run into error, system will record the problem to txt. And I send to deepseek to search how to solve. Dramatically, deepseek find the correct reason is that my forge version is incorrect. But I don’t trust and border to change.
entry.summary: I want to set a Minecraft server. But it always run into error.

entry.title: pay attention when using gsap scrollTrigger
entry.content:
I run into a problem during I use gsap scrollTrigger library. When I scroll the screen, the target element is work and horizontal scroll to right. But the thing is the following element is also scroll up during the target element is scrolling to right. I fall in to meditation. The following element is suppose to scroll up after the crosswise scroll is finish.

Over some hours, I find the reason. The father box of the target element is flex and set a align-items or justify-content. And the target element’s display cannot be flex. In sum up, both target’s father and target cannot be a flex box. After I erase these codes, the process is work.
entry.summary: I run into a problem during I use gsap scrollTrigger library. When I scroll the screen, the target element is work and horizontal scroll

entry.title: setting children box width
entry.content:
If the father level set the property of flex, the children level box will has the default property like flex: 0 1 0, corresponding to the following property flex-shrink: 0, flex-grow: 1, flex-basis: 0. In that case, your width property is invalid.

If you want to set the fix width, setting children property to flex: 0 0 YOUR_WIDTH(the flex of the father level’s property must set to flex-direction: row;), but the property of width is also invalid.

Or setting children property to flex: 0 0 auto. Then the property of width is work.
entry.summary: If the father level set the property of flex, the children level box will has the default property like flex: 0 1 0, corresp

entry.title: back up system at regular intervals
entry.content:
don’t install application causally. I downloaded docker and deleted it before long, then restarted. Unexpectedly, my user folder(edwin) was eaten. I call help, my teacher tell my that I gave docker a power authority, so it will do something unexpected thing. Docker can only install in virtual environment or sever which don’t have important file.

Coincidentally, my windows was running a sever. Finally, I decided to reinstall my system. And I was reflecting the whole accident why it would happen. And the answer is back up system at regular intervals.
entry.summary: don’t install application causally. I downloaded docker and deleted it before long, then restarted. Unexpectedly, my user fo

entry.title: the process of my windows repairing
entry.content:
Yesterday, I deleted my user account and change a new password. Therefore, I was under the confusion what password is it and the account was locked. I search a lot of method. Finally, I choose the PE tool but I don’t have windows PC, even my virtual windows can’t work. I had decided to go to school next day. I asked Jasper to help me open the computer room. I tell him what I was facing the problem then he give me a U storage which is PE tool(老毛桃). I also downloaded another PE tool(微PE), but it seem not ok. Eventually, I take the U storage Jasper gave me and get home. I appreciate him. If he no give me 老毛桃, I bet I will spend more time.

After I unlock the password, I log in a new account. Fortunately, C disk and D disk both are exist. But I am using the new account, the edwin folder in users. I want to use Edwin user folder be my main user faolder. And I almost cut the Edwin folder to my current user folder. I become smarter, I search the method which change my current user folder to edwin user folder. Finally, nothing are disappear.
entry.summary: Yesterday, I deleted my user account and change a new password. Therefore, I was under the confusion what password is it and the account

entry.title: default flex box
entry.content:
Flex would change the state of element. Width would be set to 100%.

Whatever the flex-direction is row or column.

I often meditate on that thing why the box would occupy the whole width without setting, even span.

Unless the element is the flex children, it wouldn’t set width to 100% by default.

content can beyond the border. And border also can beyond the screen.
entry.summary:
Flex would change the state of element. Width would be set to 100%.

Whatever the flex-direction is row or column.

entry.title: References between js
entry.content:
If module is referenced by index.html, all js below that module can use the function without referenced module, even needn’t import and module.js needn’t export.

If module.js doesn’t be referenced by index.html, other js can only import module.js function and which also need to export.

Because moduleC.js is upper than main.js, so ccc first. And I guess all code should waiting the module loaded then run. First, import moduleA in faster than moduleB in main.js, and moduleB is referenced by moduleA. So it will output bbb first, then aaa. And moduleB.js has been referenced, so it wouldn’t occur again even main.js refer it.
entry.summary: If module is referenced by index.html, all js below that module can use the function without referenced module, even needn’t import and m

entry.title: HTMLDocument.style detail
entry.content:
HTMLDocument.style is point to DOM

So it mean HTMLDocument.style just refer html label. Even though you have written the color in css file but not written in html label, it just print ‘’ in terminal.
entry.summary: HTMLDocument.style is point to DOM

entry.title: set percentage in css
entry.content:
If you want to set a percentage width or height, you must sure the parent nood have set a fix width or height, min-width and min-height are not the kind of fix. normally, you can set a min-width and width to make a responsive website. This approach like flex-grow flex-shrink flex-base, flex-grow can automatically adjust, flex-base is set a base size.

flex-basis is a CSS property used in a flex container to define the initial size of a flex item before any extra space is distributed based on flex-grow or flex-shrink properties. Think of flex-basis as a starting point for the width (in a row layout) or height (in a column layout) of the flex item.

PS: If father flex-direction is row, the children can’t set width. Conversely, If the flex-direction is column, the height parameter of children will invalid. You only can set the flex-base to modify your main-axis sizing.

And the cross-axis sizing is default 100% without setting align-items.

GPT said

Your color-bar div isn’t taking up the full 60% height as expected due to a few potential issues. Here’s how to troubleshoot and fix this:

  1. section-one height constraints: Since section-one is defined to have a minimum height (min-height: 90vh), the color-bar div’s height of 60% is relative to the .section-one container, which can make the layout behave unexpectedly based on screen height.

  2. Parent container height: Because .section-one only has a min-height, its height can change if the content inside it grows, making color-bar‘s height unpredictable.

  3. Testing with height directly: To see the desired effect of color-bar taking up 60% of the viewport height, try setting its height explicitly as height: 60vh; (viewport height). Alternatively, ensure .section-one has a fixed height rather than just min-height.

Here’s the modified code with 60vh applied to color-bar:

Or set the height of .section-one to a fixed height, for example, 90vh, to make the 60% height work as intended:

This should help you see the color-bar at the expected height. Let me know if this works for you!
entry.summary: If you want to set a percentage width or height, you must sure the parent nood have set a fix width or height, min-width and min-height a

entry.title: delate function js
entry.content:
I make a adjust seat website, which increase my understanding of javascript.

I learned how to delate the loop

and

Once, I make a sleep function, but I forget to return the Promise data.

Which let me impress. And I find that no need to change asyncfunction.

Because it is no use to add async to sleep function, only add async to your operative function, adding await sleep(delate) just take effect. Otherwise, your operative wouldn’t wait the sleep function, running next code directly.
entry.summary:
I make a adjust seat website, which increase my understanding of javascript.

I learned how to delate the loop

entry.title: encourtered some problems in my english writing homework
entry.content:
I try to use GPT to assist me to doing homework. It is really helpful and explain clearly, answering some deep and specific question.

me:

​here is a topic”Working from home or working in the office:which is better?” I want to ask why this sentence use working form home instead of working in home or at home

GPT:

  • “From” implies origin or source, which makes sense here because it suggests that work is being done starting from a home location.
  • “In home” is not correct because “home” doesn’t function as a place you can be “inside” in this context.
  • “At home” could make sense in casual settings to mean you’re doing something at your residence, but in the phrase “working from home,” the focus is on the origin of the work, not the specific physical location.

in office. emphasizes being physically inside a specific place

from home. suggests that home is the starting point or base for
your work, without necessarily emphasizing a specific location within the home.

not only we can ask GPT explain, but also can let GPT revise your sentence like correct your grammar.

which can interpret detailedly why you get wrong .
entry.summary: I try to use GPT to assist me to doing homework. It is really helpful and explain clearly, answering some deep and specific question.

entry.title: The first interview practice
entry.summary: 这是一篇加密文章，需要密码才能继续阅读。

entry.title: Build_paddleocr_environment
entry.content:
whenever I want to build a new environment on python, it must disturb me a long time. Just now, I want to learn OCR suddenly, because I want to write a code which can automatically do the MCQ on website. I ever watch the course at bilibili, but it is not entire. I consider I need to learn how to read the official document and use the product.

paddleocr, I find that I can’t casual install or uninstall anything, like numpy, when I copy the code in terminal, it maybe install the suitable numpy automatically. If I reinstall it, it will get wrong.

If you have something wrong, maybe rebuild the environment is the best method.
entry.summary: whenever I want to build a new environment on python, it must disturb me a long time. Just now, I want to learn OCR suddenly, because I w

entry.title: National holiday
entry.summary: 这是一篇加密文章，需要密码才能继续阅读。

entry.title: The distinction between adding if and not adding if in a sentence
entry.content:
I found a sentence “how about if you watch this movie with me?” in Duolingo. I’m curious why it would insert ‘if’ in the sentence above. Then, I asked GPT.

“how about if you watch this movie with me?” why the above sentence need to add ‘if’

The word “if” in the sentence “How about if you watch this movie with me?” is used to propose a hypothetical situation or suggestion. It introduces the idea that “watching the movie” is something the other person might choose to do. Without “if,” the sentence would sound more like a direct invitation rather than a suggestion for consideration.

Here’s a breakdown:

  • With “if”: “How about if you watch this movie with me?” This implies you’re offering the idea of watching the movie together, but you’re framing it as a possibility, leaving room for the other person to think about it.
  • Without “if”: “How about you watch this movie with me?” This comes across as more of a direct suggestion or invitation, where the choice seems less hypothetical and more like an expectation.

The “if” softens the suggestion, making it feel more open-ended and polite.

So, I learned it.
entry.summary: I found a sentence “how about if you watch this movie with me?” in Duolingo. I’m curious why it would insert ‘if’ in the sentence above.
